description: Offline CVE database for endpoint vulnerability scanning

cves.name: EternalBlue (MS17-010)
cves.description: Remote code execution in SMBv1. Used by WannaCry, NotPetya.

cves.name: BlueKeep
cves.description: Remote code execution in Remote Desktop Services.

cves.name: Zerologon
cves.description: Privilege escalation via Netlogon protocol.

cves.name: PrintNightmare
cves.description: Remote code execution in Print Spooler service.

cves.name: PrintNightmare RCE
cves.description: Remote code execution variant of PrintNightmare.

cves.name: HiveNightmare/SeriousSAM
cves.description: Local privilege escalation via SAM database access.

cves.name: Follina
cves.description: Remote code execution via Microsoft Diagnostic Tool.

cves.name: Outlook Elevation of Privilege
cves.description: NTLM relay via Outlook calendar invite.

cves.name: Office/Windows HTML RCE
cves.description: Remote code execution via specially crafted Office documents.

cves.name: Windows Kernel Elevation
cves.description: Kernel privilege escalation used by Lazarus Group.

cves.name: Windows Kernel Privilege Escalation
cves.description: Use-after-free in Windows kernel.

cves.name: Equation Editor RCE
cves.description: Memory corruption in Equation Editor. Widely exploited.

cves.name: OLE2Link RCE
cves.description: Remote code execution via OLE2Link in RTF/DOCX files.

cves.name: MSHTML RCE
cves.description: Remote code execution via ActiveX controls in Office documents.

cves.name: Follina MSDT
cves.description: Remote code execution via ms-msdt protocol handler.

cves.name: Acrobat Out-of-Bounds Write
cves.description: Arbitrary code execution via crafted PDF.

cves.name: Acrobat Use-After-Free
cves.description: Use-after-free vulnerability in Acrobat.

cves.name: Acrobat Reader RCE
cves.description: Use-after-free leading to arbitrary code execution.

cves.name: Log4Shell
cves.description: Remote code execution in Log4j. Affects Java applications globally.

cves.name: Psychic Signatures
cves.description: ECDSA signature validation bypass in Java.

cves.name: Chrome V8 Type Confusion
cves.description: Type confusion in V8. Exploited in the wild.

cves.name: Chrome V8 Type Confusion
cves.description: V8 type confusion exploited in the wild.

cves.name: Chrome V8 Type Confusion
cves.description: V8 type confusion, active exploitation.

cves.name: Firefox Animation Timeline UAF
cves.description: Use-after-free in Animation timelines. Exploited in the wild.

cves.name: Firefox Sandbox Escape
cves.description: Sandbox escape vulnerability.

cves.name: 7-Zip Zstandard Decompression RCE
cves.description: Integer underflow in Zstandard decompression leading to RCE.

cves.name: 7-Zip 7Z Integer Overflow
cves.description: Integer overflow in 7Z archive handling.

cves.name: WinRAR Code Execution
cves.description: Arbitrary code execution via crafted RAR archive. Widely exploited by APTs.

cves.name: WinRAR Recovery Volume RCE
cves.description: Out-of-bounds write in recovery volume processing.

cves.name: PuTTY ECDSA Key Recovery
cves.description: ECDSA private key recovery due to biased nonce generation.

cves.name: OpenSSL Buffer Over-read
cves.description: Buffer over-read in SSL_select_next_proto.

cves.name: OpenSSL X.509 Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Buffer overflow in X.509 certificate verification.

cves.name: Python URL Parsing Bypass
cves.description: URL parsing bypass allowing blocklist circumvention.

cves.name: Node.js HTTP Request Smuggling
cves.description: HTTP request smuggling via chunk extension parsing.

cves.name: Apache Path Traversal
cves.description: Path traversal and RCE via crafted request.

cves.name: Apache SSRF/RCE
cves.description: Server-side request forgery leading to RCE.

cves.name: nginx HTTP/3 NULL Pointer
cves.description: NULL pointer dereference in HTTP/3 module.

cves.name: PHP CGI Argument Injection
cves.description: Argument injection in PHP CGI on Windows.

cves.name: PHP iconv Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Buffer overflow in iconv leading to RCE.

cves.name: VMware vCenter Server RCE
cves.description: Out-of-bounds write in vCenter DCE/RPC protocol.

cves.name: VMware vCenter Heap Overflow
cves.description: Heap overflow in vCenter Server.

cves.name: FortiOS Out-of-Bounds Write
cves.description: Out-of-bounds write in FortiOS SSL VPN.

cves.name: FortiOS Heap Overflow
cves.description: Heap overflow in FortiOS SSL-VPN.

cves.name: AnyConnect Privilege Escalation
cves.description: Local privilege escalation in Cisco AnyConnect.

cves.name: Zoom Input Validation RCE
cves.description: Improper input validation leading to code execution.

cves.name: TeamViewer Privilege Escalation
cves.description: Improper signature verification leading to privilege escalation.

cves.name: AnyDesk Local Privilege Escalation
cves.description: Local privilege escalation via background service.

cves.name: VLC MMS Integer Overflow
cves.description: Integer overflow in MMS stream handling.

cves.name: Wireshark NTLMSSP Dissector Crash
cves.description: Denial of service via crafted NTLMSSP packet.

cves.name: Terrapin SSH Attack
cves.description: SSH protocol prefix truncation attack (Terrapin).

cves.name: Git Clone RCE
cves.description: Remote code execution via crafted repository with symlinks.

cves.name: VS Code Workspace Trust Bypass
cves.description: Remote code execution via workspace trust bypass.

cves.name: cURL SOCKS5 Heap Overflow
cves.description: Heap buffer overflow in SOCKS5 proxy handshake.

cves.name: SQL Server Native Scoring RCE
cves.description: Remote code execution via native scoring mechanism.

cves.name: MySQL Server DoS
cves.description: Denial of service in MySQL Server optimizer.

cves.name: PostgreSQL PL/Perl Env Variable RCE
cves.description: Arbitrary code execution via environment variable manipulation.

cves.name: Docker AuthZ Plugin Bypass
cves.description: Authorization plugin bypass leading to privilege escalation.

cves.name: Notepad++ Heap Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Heap buffer write overflow in UTF8 to UTF16 conversion.
